text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: I'm not hitting the track on my own today!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: You ready, Helios?!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: I was born readyyy! ♪ Brrrat brrrat brrrrrat! ☆

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Takarazuka Kinen, let's gooo! ★ Let's slay this,
Palmster!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. And McQueen's here. Ryan too. Even
Grandmother Mejiro's coming to watch, just like
at the spring Tenno Sho. But...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: I'm different today! Now I have something to be proud of!
choice_data_list:
Actually, about Grandmother Mejiro... It looks
like she can't make it.

Actually, about Grandmother Mejiro... It looks
like she can't make it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: What? She's not coming? Seriously?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In place of encouragement, I give her some
important information. Apparently, Grandmother
Mejiro has an important meeting back in
Hokkaido and can't come today.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
She's not coming... In other words...
I can go wild!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: This is my chance to really let go!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Aw yeahhh!

text_block_list.name: Palmer and Helios
text_block_list.text: Waheyyy! ☆ Let's gooooo!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Mejiro Palmeeeer! Wooo!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Daitaku Heliosss! Pew pew! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer heads to the paddock in much
higher spirits than at the spring Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
This Takarazuka Kinen is a carnival! And me and
my bestie are gonna slaaay todaaay!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Waheeey! ☆ Turn! ♪ Shout! ♪ Rile up that crowd!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
We're the greatest duo you've ever seen! No one
can keep up with these feet! ☆ 'Cause we'll never
stop movin'! Yeet yeet! ★

text_block_list.name: Palmer and Helios
text_block_list.text: Waheeeeeyyy! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Holy dumbbells! Get a load of Palmer, McQueen!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I... don't know exactly what is going on, but it
appears she is ready to fight back now.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. She is quite out of control... However, I will
admit that I like her better this way.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: (I'm here today... as myself.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
(Whether I win or lose... I can run as myself. Let's
gooo!)

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Is that... Helios?! I think that's Helios!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Besides Mejiro McQueen and Mejiro Ryan, there
are some other interesting opponents here today.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Hey, boss! I didn't expect to see you at the
Takarazuka Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Oh, Bamboo?! No way!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Actually, now that I think about it, I do remember
seeing your name on the guest list...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory. She's the hot-blooded
disciplinary committee chair at Tracen and is
known for being good at sprints and miles.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
What're you doing here? Isn't this distance a little
much for you? Aren't you gonna run outta steam
halfway?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I know, but my fans have really been going
wild for me. They're calling me their dream.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
So if they want me here, I've got no choice but to
run, you know? The Takarazuka Kinen's the race
where dreams come true, after all.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
No kidding... Gotcha. Well, if you're their dream,
then my dream is...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
My bestie over there! We're runnin' all the way to
the finish line, laughing like what what!
